name: pantheon
description: A pantheon of disciplines for coding agents — one install, everything.

plugins.name: pantheon
plugins.description: 16 pantheon-native disciplines (auto-routing that learns you, self-recalling memory, a verification gate that blocks fake 'done', receipts + dashboard, budget caps, doctor, team packs, forge, cross-agent export) plus 172 merged skills under pantheon-native names (188 total) — attributed, licenses retained. Zero dependencies.
